name: Dilly Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Potatoes - steamed, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare potatoes and peas. Set aside to cool; add celery.
2. Sprinkle salt in a salad bowl. Rub garlic around the bowl; discard garlic.
3. Add vinegar, mustard, sugar, mayonnaise, yogurt, scallions, and dill. Mix until combined.
4. Add potatoes, peas, celery, and freshly ground pepper to taste. Mix gently.
5. Garnish with sprigs of dill.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
